title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan, founders of Corgi, rebuilt the insurance industry from the ground up by questioning legacy defaults and pursuing ambitious goals. After two years of regulatory challenges and multiple near-failures, the company secured a $108M Series A and is projected to hit several hundred million in ARR, demonstrating how time, execution, and fresh perspectives create defensible competitive advantages.
